sprint: Sprint 42 -- V0.27.19 TI-002 chain_validate_aggregate.py dedupe + chain-tip-validation-authoritative semantic (pre-/chain-validated unblock)
spec: offices/tester/gaps/2026-05-11-chain-validate-aggregate-double-count.md (Argus's TI-002 gap entry) + offices/ralph/inbox/2026-05-22-from-cio-ralph-interactive-ti-002-v0.27.19-fix.md (CIO interactive dispatch with expanded path-B scope per CIO 2026-05-23 ratification)
backlogItem: Final tooling fix before /chain-validated for V0.27.1..V0.27.19 -> main. Two bugs in one story: (1) TI-002 -- chain_validate_aggregate.py double-counts sprints with multiple archive snapshots (e.g., Sprint 41 archived once at V0.27.17 deploy + again at V0.27.18 deploy + the live sprint.json all currentVersion=V0.27.18 -> triple-counted); (2) chain-tip-validation-authoritative semantic -- aggregator previously marked every earlier patch V0.27.2..V0.27.17 as unvalidatedSprints because none had /sprint-validated run individually (each was superseded by the next patch). CIO chain-end-merge rule: chain-tip's validatedAt is authoritative for the whole chain. Fix aligns aggregator semantics with the policy. Both fixes shipped as one US-358 commit by Ralph 2026-05-23 (commit 897f1bd on sprint/sprint42-v0.27.19-ti-002 branch). Pre-flight gate now exits 0 + chainStatus: READY + chainTipVersion: V0.27.18 (gate -- chain-end-merge rule) reported in pretty output.
createdBy: Marcus (PM) Session 42 2026-05-23 -- minimal post-Ralph wrap. Sprint contract follows Ralph's commit, not pre-registered; this is the audit trail for the V0.27.19 patch sprint between V0.27.18 (Sprint 41 validated by Argus) and /chain-validated.

testBaseline.note: Inherited from V0.27.11 / Sprint 37 baseline (commit 6184a7f). Carried through V0.27.12-18. Re-snapshot after Sprint 42 lands -- new test file tests/pm_scripts/test_chain_validate_aggregate.py adds 21 tests.

sprintNotes: Minimal patch sprint to unblock /chain-validated. PM tooling only; no Pi or server code; no deploy needed.
Branched from sprint/sprint41-bugfixes-V0.27.17 tip (commit 73459e4 -- includes all Sprint 41 + V0.27.18 + pre-chain-merge cleanup work).

Ralph executed interactively per CIO 2026-05-23 dispatch -- not autonomous ralph.sh. Single commit 897f1bd. 21 new tests in tests/pm_scripts/test_chain_validate_aggregate.py covering: single-archive baseline + multi-archive dedupe + chain-tip-validated/not-validated gate semantics + empty-chain edge case.

Why path B (chain-tip-authoritative) over path A (retroactive per-sprint /sprint-validated) per CIO 2026-05-23: 'it is working good enough; let's not chase a ghost; let's get V0.27.19 in and validated then on to V0.28.X.' Pragmatic alignment of tooling semantics with chain-end-merge rule.

Verification gates GREEN: (a) pytest tests/pm_scripts/test_chain_validate_aggregate.py 21/21 pass in 13.21s; (b) python offices/pm/scripts/chain_validate_aggregate.py --chain V0.27 --strict exits 0 (was exit 1 before); (c) human report shows new chainTipVersion line + dedupe (V0.27.11/16/17 appear once each, not twice); (d) ruff clean on both touched files.

Side-news for /chain-validated commit footer (per saved wording at offices/pm/scripts/chain-validated-commit-footer-V0.27.md): Drive 23/24 dual-attribution known scoped exception (B-107 V0.28.0 TOP PRIORITY) + regression manifest F-005/F-007/F-008/F-011/F-012 HELD pending V0.28.0 tripwire + Drive 25 single-attribution-clean evidence supports bounded-historical-artifact framing.
V0.27.19 RELEASE_VERSION bump applied PM-side post-Ralph commit. No deploy artifacts (.deploy-version stays at V0.27.18; PM tooling doesn't ship to Pi/server).

stories.title: TI-002 chain_validate_aggregate.py dedupe + chain-tip-validation-authoritative semantic
stories.intent: Fix two related bugs in PM tooling that gate /chain-validated. (1) TI-002: dedupe sprint archive enumeration so multiple archive snapshots of the same sprint don't multi-count. (2) Chain-tip semantic: treat highest-currentVersion sprint as authoritative for chain validation state per CIO chain-end-merge rule; don't require per-sprint /sprint-validated for superseded patches.

filesToTouch: tests/pm_scripts/test_chain_validate_aggregate.py (NEW -- 21 tests covering dedupe + chain-tip + edge cases)

groundingRefs.value: Argus 2026-05-11 gap entry: TI-002 chain_validate_aggregate.py double-counts when multiple sprint.archive.*.json files share the same currentVersion. Low-severity per Argus -- 'transient-state bug; would mislead the /chain-validated pre-flight, not corrupt anything.' But under --strict the wrong count blocks /chain-validated.
groundingRefs.unit: Argus gap entry + PM verification 2026-05-22 (V0.27.11/16/17 each appeared twice in unvalidatedSprints pre-fix)

groundingRefs.value: CIO chain-end-merge rule (2026-05-08/10): main = 'fully functional working system'; sprint branches stay deployed-but-pre-merge until the whole chain validates IRL. The chain validates as a WHOLE at the tip; earlier patches were superseded by successive ones and are not re-validated individually.
groundingRefs.source: MEMORY.md Standing CIO directives + projectManager.md PM Rule 9

groundingRefs.value: PM aggregator dry-run 2026-05-23 (pre-Ralph): unvalidatedSprints list had V0.27.2..V0.27.17 ALL present (none had /sprint-validated run individually); only V0.27.18 had Argus's validatedAt stamp from Sprint 41 close. Under --strict, exit 1 -> /chain-validated Phase 2 aborts.
groundingRefs.unit: empirical state confirming the policy/tooling mismatch

acceptance: Pre-flight: rg 'inChain|unvalidatedSprints|chainStatus' offices/pm/scripts/chain_validate_aggregate.py produces an inventory of every live touchpoint of the aggregator's semantic; result documented in completionNotes.

Dedupe: chain_validate_aggregate.py aggregateChain() dedupes by sprint identity (currentVersion or sprintTitle -- Ralph's choice); multiple archive snapshots of the same sprint produce one inChain entry.
Chain-tip semantic: chainStatus = 'READY' if chain-tip sprint (highest currentVersion lexicographically) has non-null validatedAt; earlier sprints' validatedAt=null does NOT block chainStatus=READY.
Pretty output: human report shows new 'chainTipVersion: VX.Y.Z (gate -- chain-end-merge rule)' line + clarifying note that earlier-NULL is expected under chain-end-merge rule.

21 tests in tests/pm_scripts/test_chain_validate_aggregate.py covering: single-archive baseline (regression gate) + multi-archive dedupe + chain-tip validated/not-validated + earlier-sprint-NULL no longer blocks + empty-chain edge case.
verification: python offices/pm/scripts/chain_validate_aggregate.py --chain V0.27 --strict; echo $? -> exit code 0 (was 1 pre-fix)

python offices/pm/scripts/chain_validate_aggregate.py --chain V0.27 -> human report contains 'chainStatus: READY' + 'chainTipVersion: V0.27.18 (gate -- chain-end-merge rule)' + dedupe verified (V0.27.11/16/17 appear once each in unvalidatedSprints, not twice)
invariants: No product code touched (Pi or server)
Existing aggregator CLI flags (--chain, --paths, --json, --strict) all still work; backward-compatible API

filesActuallyTouched: offices/pm/scripts/chain_validate_aggregate.py (UPDATE -- aggregateChain() dedupes by currentVersion keeping latest snapshot; chainStatus derives from chain-tip's validatedAt; renderHumanReport prints new chainTipVersion line + earlier-NULL informational note)

tests/pm_scripts/test_chain_validate_aggregate.py (NEW -- 21 tests / 414 lines across multiple test classes covering core dedupe + chain-tip-validated + chain-tip-not-validated + earlier-NULL-allowed + empty-chain edge case + pretty-output content invariants)

grounding.evidence: Aggregator output shows '[OK     ] V0.27.18   2026-05-22T17:15:16Z   ... <-- chain tip' in the per-sprint table; chainStatus: READY despite 12 earlier sprints having validatedAt=null

feedback.completionNotes: US-358 LANDED via single Ralph commit 897f1bd on sprint/sprint42-v0.27.19-ti-002 branch. Interactive Ralph session per CIO 2026-05-23 dispatch -- not autonomous ralph.sh. Two related fixes shipped together: (1) TI-002 dedupe (Argus's 2026-05-11 gap entry) + (2) chain-tip-validation-authoritative semantic alignment (CIO chain-end-merge rule per PM Rule 9). Aggregator pretty output enhanced with new chainTipVersion line + informational note that earlier-NULL is expected under chain-end-merge rule (no false-alarm for /chain-validated operator). 21 hermetic tests cover the new behavior + regression-gate existing behavior. Verification gates GREEN: aggregator --strict exit 0 (was 1); chainStatus: READY (was INCOMPLETE); chainTipVersion: V0.27.18 reported; ruff clean. Scope-fence honored: only 2 files touched (the script + the new test file); zero product code; zero deploy artifacts; backward-compatible CLI API.
